items.title: 'No-one feels safe now': Residents of Romanian city hit by drone share fears

items.title: What to Know About the Ebola Outbreak
items.summary: Aid agencies are racing to help underequipped health workers in the Democratic Republic of Congo. More than 245 people are now suspected to have died from the virus.
